Skills.Name: Acrobatics
Skills.Description: Athletic finesse — the foundation of evasive movement. Owning this tree unlocks individual acrobatic powers.

Powers.Name: Dodge
Powers.Description: +2 DV — always alert; harder to land a hit on you.

Powers.Name: Tumble
Powers.Description: Active ability: swap positions with an adjacent creature. Hostile targets get dazed (Confused 1T); allies just trade places. No weapon required. 20-turn cooldown.
